comment.body: In my experience, only people who can practice self-reflection manage to survive here too. It’s hard, and some people just aren’t built for it. For example, my brother has ADHD. He couldn’t learn to day trade or swing trade. But he’s good at investing. Even W Buffett has never been good at day trading. So it’s nothing to be ashamed of. Since 2020 it’s become a fad, so everyone tries to force it. The same thing happened during the dot-com bubble. If you remember, it was everywhere. “everyone should day trade” was all you heard
